productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Vespa Graphic Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with the adidas patented Triple-Stripe, a ribbed neckline, rubber print, branded rivet below the nape of the neck and embroidered branding above the hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte and this tee is part of their Summer Vespa collection. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this tee with a classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
